task: AI agents for SMB email and social marketing automation

result.json_content: {"result":"Top AI agents & platforms for SMB email + social automation include: 1) Mailchimp – AI send-time optimization, predictive personalization, automated drip email & social ad campaigns from <$20/mo. 2) HubSpot Marketing Hub – AI copy, lead scoring, cross-channel workflows (email, social, SMS). 3) ActiveCampaign – predictive sending, split automations, social audience sync. 4) Brevo (Sendinblue) – AI email/SMS send-time, social retargeting from $19/mo. 5) Klaviyo – AI-generated segments, subject-line A/B tests, SMS/push/email flows for ecommerce. 6) Zoho Marketing Plus – AI “Zia” assistant, multi-channel automations. 7) Jasper.ai – generative AI for email & social copy. All integrate with major CRMs, offer free/low-cost tiers, and provide drag-and-drop builders suited for small teams."}
